name: team stat with def unit and rate type
description: Test case for team stat with def unit and rate type
expected_query: with "t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4" as (select "nfl_plays"."def", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' group by "nfl_plays"."def"), "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1" as (select "nfl_plays"."def" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."def"), "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1_team_stats" as (select "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1"."nfl_team", sum(t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1" group by "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", CAST(t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4" on "t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4"."def" = "player"."current_nfl_team" left join "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1_team_stats" on "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by "t3d124e1d3a0de772b11da4a40e7dc6e1_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", t2656aa6e1ceff4cbb0f235fae2cb44e4.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
